query_text: Hepatocellular carcinoma FFPE or frozen liver tissue with matched serum. TNM staged. Etiology documented (HBV, HCV, alcohol, NASH). Child-Pugh score preferred. N >= 30.

parsed.assay_context: HCC early detection biomarker panel — serum proteomics and methylation markers for hepatitis-driven vs NASH-driven HCC stratification
